title: cot totem
description: resource pack that changes the texture of the totem to a cute cot
body:
**cot totem** 

If all your life you have wanted to get a beautiful cute cat called Cot instead of your boring nosed totem, I know what to offer you! This resource pack will brighten up your everyday life, making the game of Minecraft a little sweeter and kinder, because everything where there is a cat becomes cute and kind
